commands.cmd: PGPASSWORD="${HOSTLENS_POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-}" PGCONNECT_TIMEOUT=5 psql -tAqX --dbname=bloatdb -c "SELECT json_build_object('total_tables', (SELECT count(*) FROM pg_stat_user_tables), 'results', coalesce(json_agg(t), '[]'::json)) FROM (SELECT schemaname AS schema, relname AS table, n_live_tup AS n_live_tup, n_dead_tup AS n_dead_tup, round(n_dead_tup::numeric / nullif(n_live_tup + n_dead_tup, 0), 4) AS dead_ratio FROM pg_stat_user_tables ORDER BY n_dead_tup DESC LIMIT 20) t"
